name: 01_eci_latin_america_trends
message: Latin America shows persistent but heterogeneous relative complexity trajectories.
alt_text: Line chart of annual ECI trajectories for Latin American countries with selected countries highlighted.

name: 02_complexity_income
message: Complexity is positively associated with income in cross-section but not interpreted causally.
alt_text: Scatter plot of ECI and GDP per capita with Bolivia highlighted.

name: 06_bolivia_product_space
message: Bolivia occupies only part of the visual Product Space, with many higher-transformation products farther away.
alt_text: Network visualization of Bolivia RCA products and opportunity categories in the Product Space.

name: 08_bolivia_opportunity_matrix
message: Feasibility and transformation potential point to different product groups.
alt_text: Scatter plot comparing feasibility and transformation scores for Bolivia opportunity candidates.

name: 09_bolivia_top_opportunities
message: Top transformation candidates are screening priorities for sector study, not investment prescriptions.
alt_text: Horizontal bar chart of top Bolivia transformation opportunity scores.

name: 10_model_coefficients
message: Fixed-effects coefficients are observational and should be read with uncertainty intervals.
alt_text: Coefficient plot for observational fixed-effects models with confidence intervals.
